description.zh-Hans: 生成带硬边接缝、板材明暗和有限色阶的RPG地板区域，支持木板、人字拼、石砖和地毯，并保留背景输入。
description.en: Generates RPG floor regions with crisp seams, discrete board shading, planks, herringbone, stone tile, and carpet styles while preserving the background input.

triggers.zh-Hans: 地板, 木板, 人字形, 石砖, 地毯, 室内地面
triggers.en: floor, planks, herringbone, stone tile, carpet, flooring

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 渲染不同风格的室内地板（木板、人字形、石砖、地毯），用于建筑或室内场景。
exampleUsage.en: Render various interior floor styles (planks, herringbone, stone tile, carpet) for architectural or indoor scenes.
